/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/file_manager.dir/file_manager_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_manager.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_manager.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_manager.dir/src/FilePanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_manager.dir/src/PanelMediator.cpp.o -o file_manager -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui libfile_manager_core.a -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
